rows.description: Fluorine, chlorine, bromine, iodine — oxidising, toxic, corrosive. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.
Hydrochloric acid — corrosive. UN 1789. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.
Sulphuric acid — corrosive. UN 1830. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.
Ammonia — toxic gas. UN 1005 / 2073. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Hydrazine, hydroxylamine and other inorganic bases — corrosive/toxic. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Hypochlorites, chlorites, chlorates — oxidising. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Perchlorates, bromates, iodates — oxidising. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.
Nitrites, nitrates — oxidising. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Other salts — varies; many are dangerous goods. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Radioactive chemical elements + isotopes. Class 7. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Acyclic hydrocarbons (ethylene, propylene, butadiene) — flammable gas/liquid. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Cyclic hydrocarbons (benzene, toluene, xylene) — flammable liquid + carcinogen. UN 1294 / 1114. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Sulphonated/nitrated/nitrosated derivatives of hydrocarbons — toxic. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Acyclic alcohols (ethanol, methanol) — flammable liquid. UN 1170 / 1230. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.
Phenols — toxic. UN 2261. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Ethers (diethyl ether, etc.) — flammable + peroxide formers. UN 1090. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Aldehydes (formaldehyde, acetaldehyde) — flammable/toxic/corrosive. UN 1198 / 2209. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Ketones (acetone, MEK) — flammable liquid. UN 1090 / 1224. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Saturated acyclic monocarboxylic acids — corrosive. UN 2789 / 2218. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Unsaturated acyclic monocarboxylic acids + their derivatives. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Esters of inorganic acids — flammable/toxic/corrosive. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Amines (methylamine, dimethylamine) — flammable/corrosive/toxic. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.
Propellant powders — explosive. Class 1. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Prepared explosives — military/mining grade. Prohibited on most carriers without special handling. Class 1. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Detonating fuzes, percussion caps, igniters. Class 1. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Fireworks, signalling flares, fog signals — consumer fireworks heavily restricted. Class 1. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.
Matches — flammable solid. UN 1944 / 1331. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Lighters (pocket / cigar) and refills — flammable gas. UN 1057 / 1226. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Residual lyes from wood pulp manufacture. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Insecticides, herbicides, fungicides — varies, many toxic/flammable. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Anti-oxidising preparations, plasticisers. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Organic composite solvents and thinners — flammable liquid. UN 1993 / 1263. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Hydraulic brake fluids and other prepared liquids for hydraulic transmission. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Anti-freezing preparations (ethylene glycol). UN 1170. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Prepared binders, chemical preparations NOS — varies, often DG. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Perfumery / toilet waters — flammable liquid (ethanol carrier). Air shipments require IATA DG declaration above small-quantity limit. UN 1266. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Cosmetic preparations — many contain alcohol (DG) or pressurised gas (aerosols). varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Hair preparations — sprays + alcohols often DG. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Mouthwash + oral preparations containing ethanol. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Pre-shave / shaving / deodorants — many are aerosols (flammable gas). UN 1950. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Paints + varnishes (in non-aqueous solvent) — flammable liquid. UN 1263. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Paints + varnishes (water-based) — typically non-hazardous. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Glaziers' putty, mastics, etc. — flammable solvent base. UN 1263. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Primary cells/batteries — most non-lithium are non-DG; some (e.g. button cells) have weight limits. varies. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.

Lithium-ion batteries (8507.60) — UN 3480 (loose) or UN 3481 (with/in equipment). Strict IATA limits; many carriers refuse loose Li-ion. UN 3480 / 3481. Carrier-specific restrictions apply — air shipments need IATA DG declaration; sea shipments need IMDG declaration. Verify with carrier before tendering.
